titleStmt.title: SII 31.115: original edition by C. A. Padmanabha Sastri and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 115. (A.R. No. B 255 of 1938.) PANDIḶḶAPALLI, KAMALAPURAM TALUK, CUDDAPAH DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab set up in front of the Venkaṭēśvarasvāmi temple.
It is dated in Śaka 1476, Ānanda, Phālguṇa śu. 15, corresponding to March 8, Friday, 1555 A.D. (current).

It registers the gift of lands (details specified below) for the offerings to gods and also for maintaining various temple officials in the temple of Prasannarāya at Panḍiḷḷapalli by Gobbūri Timmayadēvamahārāja. The gifts of lands are as follows: 10 Kha of lands for the offerings (āragiṁpulu) 3 Kha for Tiruvaliku, 2 kha for Chatupaḍi (offering of Sandal) and 10 kha for Aruvenkaṭādri, 4 kha for Viśvakshēṇa of Sambaṭūru 3 kha for Bhōjanampalli Śrīnivāsaya, 4 kha for Kasidōju Budōju of Venkatarāyani Kōvilagamti (barber?), 1 kha for dancing lady (dāsari sāni), 4 kha for Ḍōla Nāgasarālavāru, who perform the music thrice in a day and 1 kha for Bayana, the carpenter of the temple who prepared the wooden beams and clamps for the temple building.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svastiśrī jayābhyuda
ya śālivāhana śakhā(ka)varṣaṁbu
lu 1476 Agunēṭi Ānaṁda saṁ
vatsara phālguṇa śū5lu śrīman
mahāmaṁḍalēsva(śva)ra naṁdyāla tiṁma
rājayadēva mahārājuku puṁṇyaṁgā
nu paṁdiḷlapalle prasaṁna veṁkaṭarāyani
ki gobūri tiṁmayadēva mahārāju
lugāru daṁḍaṁ samarpiṁci I
cina dharmaśāsanaṁ . Āragiṁpulaku peṭinacēsu
kha . 0 Aka(kha)ṁḍa tiruvaḷikeku peṭina cēnu Ê 3
cātupaḍiki cēnu Ê 2 nnu Aruveṁkaṭādriki
cēnu kha . 0 nu saṁbha(ba)ṭūri visvakṣēnuniki (viśvaksēnunuki)cēnu
Ê 4 nnu bhōjanavalli śrīnivāsayagāriki cē
nu kha . 3 nnu veṁkaṭarāyani kovilegaṁṭi
na kāśa sidōju budōjugāriki peṭina cē
nu Ê 4 nu dāsarisāniki peṭina cēnu Ê 1 nnu
ḍōḷa nāgasarāla vāriki mūḍuvēḷalānuvū
ḷigeṁśē(cē)sēṭaṁduku peṭina cēnu Ê 4 nnupeṭa
vēyiṁcina dharmaśāsanaṁ . yīdharmmasaku
yavaru ganaka tappinānu gōbāhmaṇavadha śē(cē)śina
pāpāna bōvuvāru . śrī śrī śrī .
guḍiki dūlālu daṁtelu cekkina bayanaku cē
nu Ê 1 yistimi .
Digital edition of SII 31.115 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
